installCommand: npm ci --cache .npm-cache && cd mobile-app && npm ci --cache ../.npm-cache
buildCommand: npm run check:architecture && npm run test:poi-autocomplete-budget && sh scripts/build-vercel-static.sh

headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=(), bluetooth=(), serial=(), clipboard-read=(), clipboard-write=(self), geolocation=(self)

default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://unpkg.com; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://router.project-osrm.org https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org https://places.googleapis.com https://routes.googleapis.com https://api.mapbox.com https://autosuggest.search.hereapi.com https://api.geoapify.com https://exp.host; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; media-src 'self'
